text.title: Contextual Inquiry Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Contextual Inquiry to a concrete case.

section.title: Nurses on hospital ward

example.code:
Participants: 4 nurses, 1 nurse-manager. Sessions: ward shifts, 60-120 min each, with signed consent.
Key themes: - session timeout (3/4): 'I print the chart because I can't find it on the iPad in time' - paper as backup (4/4): all participants carry printed charts - swipe-to-unlock too slow (2/4): observed delays during emergencies
Design implication: extend session timeout to 30 min; biometric quick-unlock; one-tap re-auth on critical screens.

section.note: Themes backed by verbatim quotes with participant counts; design implications flow from observed breakdowns, not survey answers.
